candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in preview and is the broader reported revenue label.
Also a valid top-line sales label; identical values to Total Revenue, so useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Used candidate labels as priority list for reported revenue line changes.

candidates.why: Best available direct production cost line; appears to represent core input costs and is the closest match to COGS/cost of sales.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. Selected from full preview. Manual review needed because true COGS may also involve inventory changes and small service-related costs, but 'Raw materials and consumables' is the clearest direct-cost row.

candidates.why: Likely overhead/operating expense bucket and not a total; suitable SG&A component.
Personnel-related operating overhead component; suitable SG&A component.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. No explicit SG&A row exists, so selected best overhead buckets from full preview. Excluded COGS, D&A, interest, taxes, and totals. Manual review needed because 'Other external costs' may contain some production-related spend in a manufacturing context.
No clear R&D line appears in the provided statements.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense for financial liabilities measured at amortized cost
candidates.why: Most specific interest expense line and best match among candidates.
Interest-related but narrower and less preferred than core borrowing interest.
Interest-related but narrower and less preferred than core borrowing interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest fallback; less preferred than primary reported rows.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense for financial liabilities measured at amortized cost

variables.notes: Used candidate line first, but added 'Finance cost' and 'Financial net' from full preview because the candidate list appears to miss the changing reported single-line finance/interest label across years, especially 2025. Manual review needed since these broader finance labels may include non-interest items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Finance cost, [Income Statement] Financial net

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent-only equity label, which excludes non-controlling interests and avoids double counting with MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-equity line selected to exclude NCI.
